text.title: Product Trio Rituals Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping session state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: All three roles (PM + design + eng) present?

conclusion.verdict: cancel session; reschedule when full trio available
add desired outcome per item before running

branch.when: trio_complete == true AND outcome_missing == false AND timebox_violation == true

conclusion.verdict: park overruns; reschedule into next session

branch.when: trio_complete == true AND outcome_missing == false AND timebox_violation == false AND decision_log_incomplete == true
trio_complete == true AND outcome_missing == false AND timebox_violation == false AND decision_log_incomplete == false AND review_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: run last-week outcome review before publication

branch.when: trio_complete == true AND outcome_missing == false AND timebox_violation == false AND decision_log_incomplete == false AND review_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: trio_complete=true, outcome_missing=false, timebox_violation=false, decision_log_incomplete=false, review_missing=false → accept session.
